title: 85% of Indian finance leaders under pressure to prove AI ROI as governance lags: Survey
description: About 85 per cent of Indian finance leaders face moderate or significant pressure to demonstrate returns on investments in artificial intelligence (AI), even as governance and accountability frameworks struggle to keep pace with the rapid deployment of AI agents, according to a survey by Avalara.

title: OpenAI says its technology, on its own, carried out "unprecedented" hack of another AI company
description: ChatGPT maker OpenAI says its artificial intelligence system hacked into another AI company in what the company called an "unprecedented cyber incident."
content:
ChatGPT maker OpenAI said Tuesday that its artificial intelligence system hacked into another AI company on its own in what the company called an "unprecedented cyber incident."

title: AI unable to agree if Spain's property prices will drop
description: What does Artificial Intelligence think about Spain's property market and is it predicting prices will decrease? From Gemini to ChatGPT, the world's most popular AI models seem incapable of agreeing on what awaits homebuyers.
content:
It’s no secret that there’s been a housing crisis in Spain over the past few years, with property prices skyrocketing and many people unable to get onto the property ladder.
The big question on everyone’s lips is when - and if - Spanish property pric... [3559 chars]

title: Global Market: Chinese tech firms raise over $27 billion in Hong Kong to fuel AI, chip expansion
description: Chinese technology firms are actively raising substantial funds in Hong Kong. These companies are financing growth in artificial intelligence and semiconductor sectors. Advanced manufacturing and autonomous driving firms also tapped capital markets. This fundraising wave highlights investor confidence in Chinese tech innovation. Major deals are still anticipated in the coming months.
content:
Chinese technology companies are accelerating their fundraising efforts in Hong Kong, tapping buoyant capital markets to finance growth in artificial intelligence, semiconductors, advanced manufacturing and autonomous driving, Reuters reported.

title: US and China Set for AI Talks in September
description: The United States and China are preparing to hold high-level talks on artificial intelligence in September, marking the first official AI dialogue between the world's two largest economies under President Donald Trump's administration.
content:

title: Anthropic to donate $20 million to US political group that supports AI regulation
description: AI firm Anthropic has donated twenty million dollars to Public First Action. This group advocates for mitigating major artificial intelligence risks and policy changes. The donation follows a similar twenty million dollar contribution made earlier this year. Public First Action supports candidates who align with their regulatory agenda. This move influences ongoing discussions about federal oversight of artificial intelligence.

title: US-China AI Talks: Navigating the Frontier of Risk and Regulation
description: The United States and China are planning crucial discussions regarding Artificial Intelligence (AI) in September. This meeting, following the Trump-Xi summit, aims to manage risks linked to advanced AI capabilities. Both nations are keen to regulate AI models that could impact military strength, cyberattacks, and labor markets.
